## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 — or "n/a" for trivial fixes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / refactor / chore

## Local checks

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all`
- [ ] I ran the affected command (`skillctl …`) end-to-end if the change is user-facing.

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious: design trade-offs, alternatives considered, follow-ups out of scope. -->
